dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.description: manage users, view programs and access reports
dashboard.navUsersDesc: View and manage trainers and athletes. Create, edit and delete profiles.
dashboard.navExercisesDesc: Manage the global exercise library with movement patterns and muscle groups.
dashboard.navProgramsDesc: View all active training programs on the platform.
dashboard.navStatsDesc: Advanced analytics on platform usage and athlete performance.
dashboard.navSettingsDesc: General application configuration and system preferences.
dashboard.infoNote: As an administrator you have full access to all platform features. Use the links above to manage users, view programs and access reports.

users.title: User Management
users.description: View and manage all system users
users.passwordOnce: This password will be shown only once
users.mustChange: User must change it on first login
users.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
users.deleteWarning: This action is permanent and will delete all associated data
users.confirmActivate: Are you sure you want to activate {{count}} users?
users.confirmDeactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate {{count}} users?
users.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, surname or email...

exercisesPage.title: Exercise Library Management
exercisesPage.description: View and manage all exercises, muscle groups and movement patterns in the system
exercisesPage.infoNote: Exercises created are shared with all trainers for program creation. Make sure to add valid YouTube URLs for demo videos.

programsPage.title: All Programs
programsPage.description: View and supervise all training programs in the system
programsPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, athlete or trainer...
